chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 2723 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.04.2022 For orders as to non-prosecution None present. On the last date of hearing notices were ordered to the petitioners; however, today no one has appeared. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
